message:
fix: gate Add Cluster button on test-connection result (#8924)

After a failed test-connection in the Add Cluster dialog, the Add
Cluster button remained enabled, allowing users to submit a cluster
that was known to be unreachable. Now the Add button is disabled
while testResult.reachable === false, and navigating back to edit
connection settings clears the stale test result so the button
re-enables once the user corrects their config.

Fixes #8915

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3016,6 +3016,7 @@
     "connectTestSuccess": "Connected",
     "connectTestFailed": "Connection failed",
     "connectAddButton": "Add Cluster",
+    "connectAddDisabledAfterTestFail": "Connection test failed. Edit connection settings or re-run the test before adding.",
     "connectAdding": "Adding...",
     "connectSuccess": "Cluster added successfully",
     "connectNext": "Next",
